text: Toxic acid flow - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a poison effect to them.
Poison bomb - creates a poisonous puddle when it hits a block.
Cleaning - removes all negative effects from the player.
Poisoned Arrow: +25% damage; 25% chance to apply "Poison II" for 5 sec.
Poison Immunity: 25% chance to cancel any negative effect (once per 30 sec); immune to Poison.
